title: Oh My Elder Sister Becomes An Unicorn Againnnnn!
description: A small meme mod about unicorn made by my little cousin.
body:
This is a small mod about unicorns made by my own little cousin.  

As it was created on April Fool's Day, so it is a meme mod and you do not need to be too strict with those items in this mod.  

This mod added a creature, 2 items and a command.  

These things can make your survival easier and more interesting.  

This mod added a complete system of trading with the unicorns and you can trade items from them with emeralds.  

Input command /lol and then you will also be a lovely unicorn!  

The mod has stopped to update since June 19, 2022.
